creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Älven from comment #6)

Based on the answer, this software is in a very bad shape build wise, and requires many custom steps to build.

It seems like the best course of action is to import both cadical and cadiback into cryptominisat using GH_TUPLE, and blend them into the cryptominisat project by patching the build.

Cadical and cadiback that cryptominisat uses come from custom branches, not from the official repositories that we use.
